description: 14 - 27-12-2024 - Emails betwen lan Collard (former Chief Property and Security Officer, FECDO) and the UK Security Vetting Team, CO
text:
FECDO) and the UK Security Vetting Team, CO

From: lan Collard *| Personal

Sent: Fri 27/12/2024 9:56:14 AM (UTC)

To: Jcs ; JCS

Ce: Tom Bramley Personal Patricia
Dreghorni Personal ]; Gerard
McGurk[ Personal ]

Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question

Thanks JCS

Thave no idea how quickly he will process the info. He has been advised to do so rapidly.

But fear not. We have some wiggle room because his overseas deployment is “late January” (I
don’t have a precise date yet). For the month of January he will be in the FCDO HQ, and I have
authorised hi, if required, to be there and working up to Secret (equivalent to SC) on the basis he
is a Lord and can use the ‘fit and proper’ exemption for a short period of pre-posting
deployment.

I will ask the lead FCDO directorate to keep chasing him.
Thank you for all your cooperation.

Best wishes,

Tan

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer

Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH

Mobile/WhatsA pp: Personal

From: Jes

Sent: Friday, December 27, 2024 9:49:03 AM
Ts JCS

Cc: Tom Bramley ; lan Collard * ; Patricia Dreghorn
Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question
Good morning

Just to update on this one, we are still to receive the completed questionnaire from the individual.

Once it arrives we will process it via our Special Handling team and we have a VCO allocated to
conduct the interview. Just to set some expectations, unless the questionnaire arrives in the next
couple of hours, it will not progress until Monday 30th as we do not have a team working this
weekend.

39

Jcs
On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 13:07, Ian Collard * < Personal > wrote:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Thanks JCS

T’ve since spoken to Tom (this morning) and we will proceed with the clearance process.
is in touch with the individual. We are grateful to GSG and UKSV for expediting

the application once the paperwork comes in.

Best wishes,

Tan

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer

Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office

King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH

Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: JCS
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:37:02 AM
To: lan Collard * < Personal >

Subject: Re: Fw: Urgent vetting question
Tan

Thanks for sharing, I was aware of this matter and have been in email contact with JCS

this morning. I take it from your note that you are seeking confirmation as to the need
for a DV, however, I understand that Jes has set Lord Mandelson up on the system. If it
is required then, once the application is completed and arrives with UKSV we can progress.
We have allocated a vetting officer who is ready to conduct the interview and the case is
flagged to be locked down to our Special Handling team to limit access.

Iam working over the festive break and will be available as required to update you on
progress.

many thanks

40


JCS

On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 11:14, Ian Collard * < Personal > wrote:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Per Michael's OOO message.

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH

Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: lan Collard *
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:12:51 AM

To: GCSOprivateoffice Personal <Personal >
Cc: Michael Roberts < Personal >; JCS
< Jes >; Vita Maynard Personal >

Subject: Urgent vetting question
Michael, Vincent's team,

Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed) appointment
of Lord Peter Mandelson as the next UK Ambassador to Washington.

The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process (specifically for
DV clearance) as a member of the House of Lords?

We think CO say he is exempt. But we want to double check given the policy around
public appointments, and whether that alters the calculation?

He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the essence.
Best wishes,
Tan

Tan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal

JCS
Head of Partner Services
UKSV, Government Security Group

Cabinet Office
Personal

NSV Privacy Notice
Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign,
Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

4
